title: Clean ScoreVersion featured flags after schema change
description: Remove legacy isFeatured/featuredKey attributes from existing ScoreVersion records so initial pinned/starred state is empty after changing ScoreVersion.isFeatured to optional string.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Cleaned production ScoreVersion table qh4jgzgazfd2ncwbekhi4woj7a: removed isFeatured, isFeatured#createdAt, featuredKey, and featuredKey#createdAt from 5,061 total touched records after single-record validation. Final scan shows 5,956 ScoreVersion records and zero remaining featured attributes. Pinned GSI query returned zero items for the affected Dosage score.
